steps.title: Translate each animal group
steps.content: Each horse uses $3$ acres, so $h$ horses use $3h$ acres. Each goat uses $1$ acre, so $g$ goats use $g$ acres.

steps.title: Write the total land equation
steps.content:
The total land required is $27$ acres:
$$3h+g=27$$
This is the same as $g+3h=27$. The answer is B.
